visuals.title: Pointer Variable Relationship
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Pointer Variable Relationship
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350" viewBox="0 0 420 350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceAlpha" stdDeviation="5"/>
      <feOffset dx="3" dy="3" result="offsetblur"/>
      <feFlood flood-color="#000000" flood-opacity="0.2"/>
      <feComposite in2="offsetblur" operator="in"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
  
  <text x="210" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Introduction to Pointers</text>
  
  <!-- Memory Address Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    Memory Address
  </text>
  
  <!-- Pointer Variable -->
  <rect x="200" y="70" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
    Pointer Variable
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow connecting pointer to memory -->
  <path d="M200 90 L170 90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Value Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
    Stored Value
  </text>
  
  <!-- Pointer to Value -->
  <rect x="200" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
    Pointer
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow connecting pointer to value -->
  <path d="M200 170 L170 170" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Dereferencing Concept -->
  <rect x="130" y="230" width="160" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    Dereferencing
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    Access value through pointer
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
